# Knuth-Style Search Fixture

Fresh current-Euler fixture for a branching research search graph.

Acceptance shape:
- one primary root and one related second root;
- two source-backed fork edges from the primary root;
- one terminal dead-end attempt with a valid repair child that reuses failure material;
- a sibling branch connected to the dead end only by `pivot` annotation;
- artifact-use and verification edges with current `extension.artifact` provenance.
